name: Bug Report
description: File a bug report
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]

---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS Sonoma, Windows 11]
- **Python version:** [e.g. 3.11]
- **Satya version:** [e.g. v0.3.0]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.

---

**Before submitting, please check:**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I have included the Satya version
- [ ] I have included steps to reproduce

**Help the project grow!** If you find Satya useful, please consider giving us a ⭐ on [GitHub](https://github.com/AnkTechsol/Satya_AI).
